title: Proclamation No. 112, s. 1936
text:
PROCLAMATION 112

REVOKING PROCLAMATION NO. 145, SERIES OF 1928, AS MODIFIED BY PROCLAMATIONS NOS. 283 AND 575, SERIES OF 1930 AND 1933, RESPECTIVELY, AND RESERVING THE LAND DESCRIBED THEREIN AND ANOTHER PARCEL OF LAND SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF CALARIAN, CITY OF ZAMBOANGA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA, ISLAND OF MINDANAO.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, I hereby revoke Proclamation Numbered One hundred forty-five, series of nineteen hundred twenty-eight, as modified by Proclamations Numbered Two hundred eighty-three and Five hundred seventy-five, series of nineteen hundred thirty and nineteen hundred thirty-three, respectively, and reserve for military purposes, under the administration of the Chief of Staff, Philippine Army, subject to private rights, if any there be, the land formerly reserved there under and another parcel of land situated in the barrio of Calarian, City of Zamboanga, Province of Zamboanga, Island of Mindanao, particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14532, to wit:

Lot No. 301-A .—A parcel of land (lot No. 301-A of the subdivision plan Pn-89, being a portion of lot No. 301 of Zamboanga townsite, G. L. R. O. Record No. ………), situated in the barrio of Calarian, City of Zamboanga, Province of Zamboanga. Bounded on the N., by lot No. 301-B of the subdivision plan; on the NE. and E., by lot No. 302-A-2-C; on the SE., by lot No. 302-A-2-C; and on the NW., by lot No. 301-B of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 19ْ 17’ W., 669.53 m., more or less, from monument No. 2, Zamboanga townsite; thence S. 23ْ 33’ W., 89.22 m. to point “2;” thence S. 84ْ 04’ W., 62.37 m. to point “3;” thence N. 71ْ 44’ E., 23.19 m. to point “4;” thence S. 87ْ 01’ E., 8.86 m. to point “5;” thence S. 86ْ 55’ E., 15.64 m. to point “6;” thence N. 17ْ 56’ E., 15.55 m. to point “7;” thence N. 17ْ 56’ E., 72.63 m. to point “8;” thence S. 86ْ 07’ E., 24.11 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of one thousand seven hundred ninety-seven (1,797) square meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “1” and “2” are marked by old P. L. S. /B. L. monuments; and the rest, by P. L. S. /B. L. cylindrical concrete monuments; bearings true; declination, 0ْ 58’ E.; date of the subdivision survey, February 6, 8, 17, and 18, 1922, and April 14-15, 1930.

Lot No. 301-B.—A parcel of land (lot No. 301-B of the subdivision plan Pn-89, being a portion of lot No. 301 of Zamboanga townsite, G. L. R. O. Record No. ………), situated in the barrio of Calarian, City of Zamboanga, Province of Zamboanga. Bounded on the NE., by lot No. 302-B of the subdivision plan; on the SE., by lot No. 301-A of the subdivision plan; on the S., by lot No. 301-A of the subdivision plan, lot No. 302-A-2-C and lot No. 302-B of the subdivision plan; and on the NW., by lot No. 302-B of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 28ْ 36’ W., 829.52 m., more or less, from monument No. 2, Zamboanga townsite; thence N. 14ْ 55’ E., 2.68 m. to point “2;” thence N. 14ْ 55’ E., 15.40 m. to point “3;” thence N. 14ْ 55’ E., 60.31 m. to point “4;” thence N. 14ْ 55’ E., 7.01 m. to point “5;” thence N 14ْ 55’ E., 24.69 m. to point “6;”  thence S. 86ْ 07’ E., 34.93 m. to point “7;” thence S. 86 07’ E., 7.33 m. to point “8;” thence S. 86ْ 07’ E., 65.97 m. to point “9;” thence S. 86ْ 07’ E., 15.57 m. to point “10;” thence S. 17ْ 56’ W., 72.63 m. to point “11;” thence S. 17ْ 56’ W., 15.55 m. to point “12;” thence N. 86ْ 55’ W., 15.64 m. to point “13;” thence N. 87ْ 01’ W., 8.86 m. to point “14;” thence S. 71ْ 44’ W., 23.19 m to point “15;” thence S. 84ْ 04’ W., 39.45 m. to point “16;” thence S. 84ْ 04’ W., 14.61 to point “17;” thence S. 84ْ 04’ W., 24.57 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of eleven thousand six hundred sixty-nine (11,669) square meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, are marked by P. L. S. /B. L. cylindrical concrete monuments; bearings true; declination, 0ْ 58’ E.; date of the subdivision survey, February 6, 8, 17, and 18, 1922, and April 14-15, 1930.

Lot No. 302-B.— A parcel of land (lot No. 302-B of the subdivision plan Pn-89, being a portion of lot No. 302 of Zamboanga townsite, G. L. R. O. Record No. ………), situated in the barrio of Calarian, City of Zamboanga, Province of Zamboanga. Bounded on the NE., by lot No. 302-A-2-C and lot No. 302-B of the subdivision plan; on the SE., by lot No. 302-A-2-C and lot No. 301-B of the subdivision plan; on the S. by lot No. 302-A-2-C; on the SW., by lot No. 301-B of the subdivision plan and lot No. 302-A-2-C; and on the NW., by lot No. 302-A-2-C. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 42ْ 12’ W., 571.88 m. more or less, from monument No. 2. Zamboanga townsite; thence S. 82ْ 48’ E., 7.50 m. to point “2;” thence S. 82ْ 51’ E., 53.59 m. to point “3;” thence S. 82ْ 42’ E., 7.32 m. to point “4;” thence S. 82ْ 50’ E., 53.74 m. to point “5;” thence S. 82ْ 50’ E., 7.20 m. to point “6;” thence S. 82ْ 50’ E., 54.76 m. to point “7;” thence S. 82ْ 50’ E., 15.28 m. to point “8;” thence S. 17ْ 56’ W., 191.09 m. to point “9;” thence N. 86ْ 07’ W., 15.57 m. to point “10;” thence N. 86ْ 07’ W., 65.97 m. to point “11;” thence N. 86ْ 07’ W., 7.33 m. to point “12;” thence N. 86ْ 07’ W., 34.93 m. to point “13;” thence S. 14ْ 55’ W., 24.69 m. to point “14;” thence S. 14ْ 55’ W., 7.01 m. to point “15;” thence S. 14ْ 55’ W., 60.31 m. to point “16;” thence S. 14ْ 55’ W., 15.40 m. to point “17;” thence S. 14ْ 55’ W., 2.68 m. to point “18;” thence N. 84ْ 04’ E., 24.57 m. to point “19;” thence N. 84ْ 04’ E., 14.61 m. to point “20;” thence N. 84ْ 04’ E., 39.45 m. to point “21;” thence S. 72ْ 45’ W., 15.04 m. to point “22;” thence S. 71ْ 14’ W., 38.43 m. to point “23;” thence S. 58ْ 03’ W., 11.58 m. to point “24;” thence S. 87ْ 50’ W., 24.68 m. to point “25;” thence S. 89ْ 30’ W., 25.10 m. to point “26;” thence N. 79ْ 37’ W., 27.03 m. to point “27;” thence N. 58ْ 42’ W., 7.05 m. to point “28;” thence N. 86ْ 27’ W., 15.99 m. to point “29;” thence N. 72ْ 14’ W., 24.23 m. to point “30;” thence N. 40ْ 34’ W., 26.60 m. to point “31;” thence N. 36ْ 02’ W., 9.98 m. to point “32;” thence N. 44ْ 20’ W., 7.34 m. to point “33;” thence N. 28ْ 10’ E., 28.37 m. to point “34;” thence N. 27ْ 45’ E., 15.48 m. to point “35;” thence N. 28ْ 12’ E., 262.97 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of fifty-eight thousand four hundred eighty-five (58,485) square meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, point “1” is marked by an old P. L. S. / B. L. monument; and the rest, by P. L. S. / B. L. cylindrical concrete monuments; bearings true; declination, 0ْ 58’ E.; date of the subdivision survey, February 6, 8, 17, and 18, 1922, and April 14-15, 1930.

Lot No. 302-A-2-C. —A parcel of land (lot No. 302-A-2-C of the subdivision plan Fr-2, being a portion of lot No. 302-A-2 of Zamboanga townsite, G. L. R. O. Record No. …), situated in the barrio of Calarian, City of Zamboanga, Province of Zamboanga. Bounded on the NE., by lot No. 2021, road, and lot No. 302-B of the subdivision plan; on the SE., by lots Nos. 299, 300, lot No. 302-B of the subdivision plan, and Basilan Strait; on the SW., by Basilan Strait, lots Nos. 301-B and 302-B of the subdivision plan; and on the NW., by lots Nos. 303-A, 303-B-2 of plan Bsd-2793, lot No. 2021, road, and lots Nos. 301-A and 302-B of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 70ْ 31’ E., 149.45 m. more or less, from monument No. 2, Zamboanga townsite; thence S. 35ْ 22’ W., 535.66 m. to point “2;” thence S. 17ْ 57’ W., 235.87 m. to point “3;” thence S. 79ْ 34’ W., 15.14 m. to point “4;” thence N. 23ْ 33’ E., 89.22 m. to point “5;” thence N. 86ْ 07’ W., 24.11 m. to point “6;” thence N. 17ْ 56’ E., 191.09 m. to point “7;” thence N. 82ْ 50’ W., 15.28 m. to point “8;” thence N. 82ْ 50’ W., 54.76 m. to point “9;” thence N. 82ْ 50’ W., 7.20 m. to point “10;” thence N. 82ْ 50’ W., 53.73 m. to point “11;” thence N. 82ْ 50’ W., 7.32 m. to point “12;” thence N. 82ْ 50’ W., 53.59 m. to point “13;” thence N. 82ْ 50’ W., 7.50 m. to point “14;” thence S. 28ْ 10’ W., 262.95 m. to point “15;” thence S. 28ْ 10’ W. 15.48 m. to point “16;” thence S. 28ْ 10’ W., 28.37 m. to point “17;” thence S. 40ْ 20’ E., 7.34 m. to point “18;” thence S. 36ْ 02’ E., 9.98 m. to point “19;” thence S. 40ْ 34’ E., 26.60 m. to point “20;” thence S. 72ْ 14’ E., 24.23 m. to point “21;” thence S. 86ْ 27’ E., 15.99 m. to point “22;” thence S. 58ْ 22’ E., 7.05 m. to point “23;” thence S. 79ْ 37’ E., 27.03 m. to point “24;” thence N. 89ْ 30’ E., 25.10 m. to point “25;” thence N. 87ْ 50’ E., 24.68 m. to point “26;” thence N. 58ْ 23’ E., 11.58 m. to point “27;” thence N. 71ْ 14’ E., 38.43 m. to point “28;” thence N. 71ْ 45’ E., 15.04 m. to point “29;” thence N. 84ْ 04’ E., 62.37 m. to point “30;” thence S. 75ْ 04’ W., 153.58 m. to point “31;” thence N. 84ْ 13’ W., 95.22 m. to point “32;” thence N. 46ْ 59’ W., 373.78 m. to point “33;” thence N. 24ْ 00’ E., 182.60 m. to point “34;” thence N. 17ْ 20’ E., 95.94 m. to point “35;” thence S. 75ْ 29’ E., 155.45 m. to point “36;” thence N. 57ْ 48’ E., 486.26 m. to point “37;” thence N. 78ْ 40’ E., 63.38 m. to point “38;” thence S. 88ْ 28’ E., 22.43 m. to point “39;” thence S. 71ْ 44’ E., 23.13 m. to point “40;” thence S. 72ْ 14’ e., 139.20 m. to point “41;” thence S. 80ْ 50’ E., 10.32 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of two hundred seventy-six thousand sixty (276,060) square meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “2,” “3,” “4,” “5,” “14,” “30,” “33,” and “34” are marked by old P. L. S. / B. L. monuments; points “31” and “32,” by stakes; points “35,” “36,” and “37,” by U. S. concrete monuments; and the rest, by P. L. S. / B. L. cylindrical concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 0ْ 58’ E.; date of the subdivision survey, April 14-15, 1930.

Lot No. 1530-A-1.— A parcel of land (lot No. 1530-A-1 of the subdivision plan Fr-2, being a portion of lot No. 1530-A of Zamboanga townsite, G. L. R. O. Record No. ), situated in the barrio of Calarian, City of Zamboanga, Province of Zamboanga. Bounded on the NE., by lot No. 1549; on the SE. and SW., by road; and on the NE., by lot No. 2021. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 20ْ 44’ E., 16.14 m., more or less, from monument No. 110, Zamboanga townsite; thence N. 77ْ 24’ W., 14.89 m. to point “2;” thence N. 72ْ 14’ W., 138.23 m. to point “3;” thence N. 71ْ 45’ W., 24.85 m. to point “4;” thence N. 88ْ 27’ W., 25.55 m. to point “5;” thence S. 78ْ 40’ W., 33.22 m. to point “6;” thence N. 57ْ 48’ E., 36.91 m. to point “7;” thence S. 71ْ 10’ E., 207.76 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of nine hundred sixty-nine (969) square meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “1” and “7” are marked by P. L. S. monuments; point “2,” by P. L. S./ B. L. cylindrical concrete monuments; points “3,” “4,” and “5,” by stakes; and point “6,” by United States concrete monuments; bearings true; declination, 0ْ 58’ E.; date of the subdivision survey, April 14-15, 1930.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this nineteenth day of November, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-six, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the second.

[SEAL]

President of the Philippines

By the President:

Secretary of the Interior
